item.title: Sheetal Cool Products Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.44% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 422.25, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Sheetal Cool Products Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.44% on 5 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Banka Bioloo Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 5% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 81.98, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Banka Bioloo Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5% on 05 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, signalling a day of pronounced selling pressure. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Sambhaav Media Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 4.18% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 6.65, Sambhaav Media Ltd locked at its lower circuit on 05 May 2026, reflecting a 4.18% decline within a 5% price band. The session was marked by unfilled supply as sellers queued up but buyers remained absent, freezing the stock at its floor price. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Winsome Yarns Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 1.57% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 1.94, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Winsome Yarns Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 1.57% on 5 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.description: At Rs 213.18, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Zenith Exports Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 5.0% on 5 May 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price, reflecting a maximum daily loss within the 5% price band. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.description: At Rs 3.97, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Viji Finance Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 3.66% on 5 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Dips Nearly 0.8% as Realty Sector Slumps; Telecom Offers Limited Support
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a broad-based decline on 5 May 2026, with the Sensex closing 617.54 points lower at 76,651.86, marking a 0.80% drop. Market breadth was weak as only six sectors advanced against 32 in decline, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid mixed global cues and subdued domestic triggers. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: NACL Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 7.45% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 176.24, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. NACL Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 7.45% on 05 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Rs 12 Calls on Vodafone Idea Ltd. See Heavy Activity — What the Strike Price Tells You
item.description: 6,267 call contracts at the Rs 12 strike price on Vodafone Idea Ltd. changed hands on 5 May 2026, with the stock closing at Rs 10.91. This surge in call activity, combined with a 3.7% gain in the cash market, highlights a notable alignment between derivatives positioning and underlying price momentum. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: 2301 Put Contracts on Delhivery Ltd at Rs 450 Strike Ahead of May Expiry
item.description: Rs 450 puts on Delhivery Ltd saw significant activity on 5 May 2026, with 2,301 contracts traded against an underlying price of Rs 450.40. The proximity of the strike to the current price and the stock’s recent price action suggest a nuanced interpretation beyond simple bearishness. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Decline Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends and Weak Breadth
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE Smallcap 250 index, witnessed a modest decline of 0.36% on 5 May 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood amid uneven sectoral trends and weak breadth. While select stocks delivered robust returns, the broader small-cap universe struggled with a significant number of decliners outpacing advancers, signalling underlying market pressures. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Performance Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment witnessed a mixed session as the BSE 100 index declined by 0.7% on 5 May 2026, continuing a five-day downtrend with a 0.4% fall. While heavyweight stocks such as Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL) delivered modest gains, defensive names like Ambuja Cements lagged, reflecting a broader divergence between defensive and cyclical sectors. Market breadth remained weak with 76 stocks declining against 24 advancing, underscoring cautious investor sentiment ahead of key corporate earnings. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Modest Decline Amid Mixed Stock Performances
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a modest decline of 0.44% on 5 May 2026, continuing a recent downtrend with a 0.83% fall over the past five trading sessions. Despite this, select stocks within the segment have demonstrated resilience, supported by technical upgrades and sectoral rotations that offer nuanced opportunities for investors. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Vidya Wires Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 95.74
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 95.74 on 05 May 2026, Vidya Wires Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally is underscored by a confluence of technical indicators pointing to sustained strength, even as the broader market trades under pressure. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts CDG Petchem Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 199.75
item.description: With a decisive breakout to Rs 199.75 on 5 May 2026, CDG Petchem Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This surge comes amid a backdrop of strong alignment across key technical indicators, underscoring the stock’s robust upward trajectory despite a broadly weaker market environment. Time: 31 minutes ago

item.title: Parker Agrochem Exports Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 13.31 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: For the third consecutive session, Parker Agrochem Exports Ltd has seen its share price decline, culminating in a fresh 52-week low of Rs 13.31 on 5 May 2026. This marks a significant 44.5% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 24, underscoring persistent selling pressure despite some positive financial indicators. Time: 32 minutes ago
